response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_status : varchar
ATTR scheduled_time : time
ATTR actual_time : time

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR registration : varchar
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Person
PK person_id
ATTR person_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewRole
PK role_id
ATTR role_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightLeg
PK flight_leg_id
ATTR flight_leg_id : varchar : PK
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL FlightLeg -> Flight : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_status
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> FlightLeg : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
